_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.
_publications._context: CX3CR1-CreER [ 71 ] were intercrossed with Nf1 flox/flox [ 1 ] | R26tdTom/tdTom, Nf1flox/flox; Nf1flox/flox; Nf1+/−; and B6D2F1 | Nf1flox/flox (Zhu et al. 2001) and Nf1GFAP CKO (Bajenaru et al. 2002) mice were generated as previously described and maintained on a C57Bl/6 background | Nf1 flox/flox mice were provided by Dr. Luis Parada at the University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center | ...the NF1 mice bred from the Prx1-Cre transgenic mice and the Nf1flox/flox mice... | Optic chiasm was microdissected from 3-month-old Nf1 flox/flox, Nf1 +/− and Nf1 +/− GFAP CKO mice to generate primary optic nerve neurospheres | Nf1flox/flox mice were obtained from Luis Parada (University of Texas Southwestern Medical Center, Dallas, TX, USA) and maintained on C57BL/6J background. | Nf1flox/flox Nf1flox/null; GFAP-Cre (OPG-1), Nf1flox/R681*; GFAP-Cre (OPG-2), Nf1flox/null; Ptenflox/wt; GFAP-Cre (OPG-3), and Nf1flox/null; Olig2-Cre (OPG-4) mice | while Nf1 flox/mut ; GFAP-Cre (FMC; [ 11 ]) and Nf1 flox/flox [ 31 ] control mice were established | The control mice for Nf1 hGFAP CKO mice are a pool of phenotypically indistinguishable mice: hGFAP-cre-; Nf1 flox/flox | crossing 2.3-kb α1(I) collagen-cre Nf1 flox/flox mice and Nf1 flox/flox mice
